title: ChangShengJue
description: ChangShengJue is a multi-feature mod(mod/module/add-on) themed around traditional Chinese aesthetics, cultivation (Xianxia), martial arts (Wuxia), adventure, agriculture, and decoration. It's currently in active development!
body:
We use AI to support the translation. Please contact us if you find any errors.

**ChangShengJue** is a multi-feature mod (mod/module/add-on) themed around traditional Chinese aesthetics, cultivation (Xianxia), martial arts (Wuxia), adventure, agriculture, and decoration. It's currently in active development!
Currently updated features include Wuxia, Adventure, Agriculture, and Decoration. More to come!

Official QQ Group: 729655721

![Vast History · Brilliant Culture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a64b8d04405f6007780e05486e47d8fa7b8d230.png)

1.New traditional Chinese village structures, ranging from Beijing-style Siheyuan (courtyard houses) to Loess Plateau underground cave dwellings (Yaodong), and architectural styles like Anhui and Suzhou.
2.Added many common Chinese plants, like various wild vegetables found roadside, and crops such as sorghum, corn, red beans, and Hami melons in fields.
3.Introduced many common Chinese animals. Beware of tigers and crocodiles – they aren't friendly when hungry!
4.New trading system with new currencies: Copper Coins, Silver Ingots, and Gold Ingots. Try minting your own coins using casting molds!
![Chinese village structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae248581b501cd3c0f600e058aac5d44cfb975d9_0.webp)
![Copper Coins, Silver Ingots, and Gold Ingots. Try minting your own coins using casting molds!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b767ae16e545252fa746bc6759191c2c5576b6d9_0.webp)

![Exquisite Architecture · Magnificent Attire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de772da2c1ddfbb58de383b76fcb3faafd6a08d0.png)

1.Added many ancient Chinese weapons, from Han Swords to Red Tasseled Spears and Hengdao (Tang-era blades). Wield these weapons to perform specialized martial arts skills.
2.Added many sets of ancient Chinese clothing and armor. Experience the beauty of traditional Hanfu! 85% of apparel supports dyeing to change appearance.
3.Over a hundred new decorative blocks with easy acquisition methods, making building beautifully in Survival mode convenient.
4.Added various traditional Chinese furniture items: wine tables, long benches, settees, Taishi chairs, mat tables...
![Chinese clothing and armor. Experience the beauty of traditional Hanfu! 85% of apparel supports dyeing to change appearance.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bea71467e98655370ad671056f63ee2211656435_0.webp)
![Chinese furniture items: wine tables, long benches, settees, Taishi chairs, mat tables...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff471fc771d4aac53a59d2a5828285722d5ea6b1_0.webp)

![Uphold Justice · The Greatness of a Xia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/402f7686490b09a49831eb199c103941ecd1ceb6.png)

1.A cup of wine, a cup of tea, a solitary figure – rely on your steed, wield your sword, and experience the free-spirited Jianghu (martial world)! Wine and tea can affect the execution of your martial skills. Armor defense can be improved with linings and under-armor.
2.Diverse martial arts skills allow for rich combinations. Through continuous training, you can eventually become a grandmaster. Internal Injury and External Injury mechanics will make your enemies more vulnerable.
3.Will you join a faction (Bangpai) or aid villages? The path is yours to choose. Accept quests and begin your journey as a Xia!
4.Don't forget to visit the ancient cities generated in the world. Find the innkeeper, buy a drink, sit down and rest. Rumor has it there are surprises hidden in the dwellings?
![Will you join a faction (Bangpai) or aid villages? The path is yours to choose. Accept quests and begin your journey as a Xia!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02ec0c9e9ff710f5e31635135856a8bac9598cd2_0.webp)
![ancient cities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/901cb694eef1b7b1fae0add8e9713864a7df725f_0.webp)

Required/Compatible Mods (For Version 1.20):
Patchouli: Adding this mod will provide you with the "Wu Fang Hui Lu" (Record of the Five Directions) book at the game's start, which documents most of this mod's features.
GeckoLib: Provides support for animations and movements.
TerraBlender: Provides support for biome generation.
